The '''CorSec Database''' was an online reference guide for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' gamers, listing some of the more important criminal NPC characters and organizations featured in the game. It consists of two alphabetically organized parts and is written in an in-universe perspective, representing the [[CorSec criminal database]].

The first part was released on [[June 9]], [[2006]] and the second part on [[June 16]], 2006.

==Parts==
*{{SonyCite|url=players/guides.vm?id=80112|text=CorSec Database A-G|int=CorSec Database A-G}}
*{{SonyCite|url=players/guides.vm?id=80113|text=CorSec Database H-Z|int=CorSec Database H-Z}}
